---
name: Documentation
about: Report an issue with documentation or suggest improvements
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue

### Location
Where is the documentation issue? (file path, URL, or section name)

### Problem
What is wrong, missing, or unclear?

### Suggested Improvement
How should the documentation be improved?

### Additional Context
Add any other context or examples here.

### Scope Note
If the docs issue changes release or backlog expectations, say whether it affects the active `v0.2.0` alpha baseline or deferred `v0.2.1` planning (`WS13` / `WS14`).
